summary: Completed e2e testing of Link Page Social Links rewrite. All backend APIs working correctly with new social_links structure {platform: {username, visible}}. Frontend editor shows all 6 social platforms with prefix+username inputs and visibility toggles. Public page renders contact links and social links with Socials header correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Link Page social links system tested. Backend stores social_links as {platform: {username, visible}} dict. Public API returns built_social_links (full URLs) and contact_links separately. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_linkpage_social_links.py contains 10 passing tests covering: GET user linkpage, social_links structure with all 6 platforms, PUT updates, public page built_social_links with correct URLs, contact_links structure.

backend_apis.notes: Returns social_links with all 6 platforms (facebook, instagram, linkedin, twitter, tiktok, youtube) in {username, visible} format
Accepts social_links update, persists changes correctly
Returns built_social_links (full URLs for visible links with non-empty usernames) and contact_links array

elements_verified: Contact Links (Call Me, Email Me, My Digital Card, Leave a Review)
Hidden socials not shown (Twitter, TikTok, YouTube)
SOCIAL LINKS section with all 6 platforms

save_functionality.notes: Verified via API: updating Twitter username and visibility, change persisted and reflected in public page built_social_links
